title: Flea Treatment in New Rochelle, NY | $350-$650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in New Rochelle, Westchester. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Starting at $350. Same-day service available.
intro: New Rochelle residents dealing with flea infestations need fast, effective solutions to protect their families and pets. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout New Rochelle, from waterfront condos near Five Islands Park to historic homes in the North End. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your home is flea-free.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Westchester County, our team understands the unique pest challenges New Rochelle homeowners face. We offer same-day service, use pet-safe treatments, and back our work with a satisfaction guarantee to give New Rochelle families complete peace of mind.
localContext: New Rochelle's diverse housing stock—from pre-war apartment buildings downtown to single-family homes near Wykagyl—each present unique flea control challenges. Our technicians are familiar with treating properties throughout the city, including multi-unit buildings along Huguenot Street and residential neighborhoods near Glen Island Park.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in New Rochelle typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers see a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as we target all life stages. We often recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure all newly hatched fleas are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours while products dry. All our technicians are licensed and follow strict safety protocols.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout New Rochelle and Westchester County. We understand that flea infestations require urgent attention, especially in homes with pets and children. Call us before noon for same-day service availability.
